fees.label: Bybit — Trading Fee Schedule (official announcement page)
fees.notes: Spot maker 0.10%, taker 0.10%; Perpetual/USDT futures maker 0.02%, taker 0.055% (standard non-VIP). Verified 2026-06-26 via web search cross-referencing bybit.com help center + third-party fee guides. Previous record (0.01%/0.06%) was from an outdated fee tier; current standard rate confirmed as 0.02%/0.055%.

kyc.label: Bybit — KYC Verification Guide
kyc.notes: KYC Lv.1 required for full withdrawal access; no-KYC limit 0 USDT/day

bonus.label: Bybit — New User Welcome Bonus
bonus.notes: Up to 30,000 USDT. Registration + deposit + futures volume tasks. 30-day window.

restricted_countries.label: Bybit — Restricted Countries List
restricted_countries.notes: US, UK, Canada restricted; full list on official page

proof_of_reserves.label: Bybit — Proof of Reserves
proof_of_reserves.notes: Merkle tree PoR published; verified by Hacken

p2p.label: Bybit — P2P Trading
p2p.notes: P2P available for fiat on/off ramp; zero fee for P2P

futures.label: Bybit — USDT Perpetual Futures
futures.notes: Up to 100x leverage on BTC/USDT perpetual

facts.notes: Max bonus 30,000 USDT across all tasks. Typical user earns $30–$200 depending on deposit and trading volume; $30,000 max requires VIP-level volume ($250K deposit + $150M trading). Headline figure confirmed as 'up to $30,020' on affiliate landing page as of 2026-06-11 internal screenshot evidence, and cross-confirmed by multiple third-party referral code pages dated June 2026. Bonus terms can change — re-check if deploying after 30 days.
facts.reviewerNote: Confidence raised from 0.27 (outdated) to 0.80 (ok) on 2026-06-26 following cross-verification: internal screenshot evidence (2026-06-11 capture) + June 2026 web search results all confirm $30,000 max is still live. The 'outdated' flag was conservative; the value is current.

facts.notes: Task completion window: search evidence suggests 7–14 days for some task types, up to 30 days for others. Issued vouchers/coupons expire 7–30 days after issuance depending on voucher type. The page termsSummary uses '7–30 days' as a conservative range — this is correct and accurate. The single value of 30 here represents the maximum window. Do not change the page termsSummary.
facts.reviewerNote: Updated 2026-06-26. Confidence raised from 0.27 (outdated) to 0.60 (partial). The '30 days' max figure still appears valid for some task types; however some bonus tasks (particularly new task-based welcome offers) now expire in 7–14 days. The page termsSummary wording '7–30 days after issuance' accurately covers the range.

facts.notes: KYC Lv.1 required to claim bonus and withdraw
Minimum deposit for deposit bonus tier

facts.reviewerNote: Updated 2026-06-26. Previous value 0.01% was from an older Bybit fee schedule. Current standard non-VIP perpetual futures maker fee confirmed as 0.02% via multiple independent sources including bybit.com help center search results and third-party fee guides (tradersunion.com, byditt.com). Matches page frontmatter (exchange.fees.futures.maker = '0.02%').

Updated 2026-06-26. Previous value 0.06% was from an older Bybit fee schedule. Current standard non-VIP perpetual futures taker fee confirmed as 0.055% via multiple independent sources. Matches page frontmatter (exchange.fees.futures.taker = '0.055%'). Both USDT and USDC perpetual contracts share this rate.

facts.notes: KYC required for full withdrawal access. No-KYC allows limited trading only.
Bybit requires KYC for any withdrawal — no no-KYC withdrawal path
US, UK and Canada residents cannot register on Bybit.com
Approximate count — spot pairs on Bybit as of last check

bonus_referral_landing.notes: Bybit × CryptoBonusWorld referral landing with code CRYPTOBONUSW pre-filled and validated. The live page states 'Unlock up to $30,020 in exclusive rewards' with a $100 sign-up bonus and deposit-tier rewards from $50 (deposit $500 & trade $100k) up to $30,000 (deposit $250K & trade $150M); top tiers require VIP-level volume. Verified live on June 11, 2026.
